name: Layered Toffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Caramel or butterscotch ice-cream topping
9 Heath candy bars (1.4 oz each), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the whipping cream just until it begins to thicken.
2. Gradually add the ice-cream topping and vanilla, beating until soft peaks form.
3. Cut the prepared angel food cake horizontally into three equal layers.
4. Place the bottom layer on a serving plate; spread with 1 cup of the cream mixture and sprinkle with 1/2 cup of chopped Heath candy bars.
5. Repeat with the middle and top layers.
6. Place the top layer on the cake; frost the top and sides with the remaining cream mixture and sprinkle with the remaining chopped Heath candy bars.
7. Store in the refrigerator.
